rerun_metadata.rerun_reason: Original parameter sweep dropped the SMA(200) axis to stay under the 50-cell cap. This re-run raises max_cells to 200 so the full 3-axis grid (stop_loss × sma50 × sma200 = 125) executes.

composite.explanation: Mixed signals (score 47/100). Some checks support the strategy and others raise concerns — treat the headline return with caution. Deflated Sharpe: probability the edge is real = 0.00. Walk-forward: out-of-sample returns degraded to 0.09× in-sample (degradation ratio).
